overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character exiting an indoor storage facility into a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character walks along wet city streets, crosses intersections, and passes under elevated highways and pedestrian bridges while surrounded by towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and futuristic vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial storage room with vending machines

events.description: approaching exit doorway with city light visible outside

agents.ego_description: walking through an industrial backroom with neon vending machines toward an exit door

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine with pink neon lighting and digital displays
large metal exit door leading to exterior
gray concrete flooring with light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit industrial storage area featuring a neon-lit vending machine. The camera moves steadily forward through the space, passing cardboard boxes and storage items, approaching a doorway where bright exterior light streams in from the city outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with elevated highway

events.description: exits building into neon-lit cyberpunk city street
enters shadow area beneath elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: stepping out into the city and walking along the sidewalk alongside moving traffic

entered.detail: towering glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows
large holographic advertisements and digital signage
reflective wet road surface with neon reflections
elevated highway structure casting shadows below

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the building into a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at night. Towering skyscrapers with glowing windows rise in the background while neon billboards illuminate the wet streets. The camera moves along the sidewalk as futuristic vehicles pass by, eventually entering the shadow of an elevated highway overpass.

events.description: passing red construction fencing on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the highway overpass

entered.detail: red mesh construction barrier along the sidewalk
tall street lights illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway, the scene is characterized by artificial lighting and the concrete architecture of the overpass. The sidewalk continues alongside a red construction fence, with street lamps providing illumination. The towering city buildings remain visible in the background while traffic moves along the road.

events.description: emerging from under overpass into open intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and walking under the yellow pedestrian bridge

notable_agents.action: woman with purple hair walking toward camera

entered.detail: bright yellow elevated pedestrian walkway structure
small green metal kiosk structure with signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the underpass into a bustling intersection dominated by a bright yellow pedestrian bridge overhead. The camera crosses the street, passing other pedestrians including a woman with distinctive purple hair, and continues under the yellow bridge structure. A green kiosk becomes visible on the left as the urban canyon of skyscrapers towers above.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath pedestrian bridge with commercial kiosk

events.description: passing green kiosk structure on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past the green kiosk and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: family group with child walking ahead on sidewalk

entered.detail: bags and debris accumulated near the kiosk
orange metal barriers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the city sidewalk beneath the yellow pedestrian bridge, passing a green commercial kiosk surrounded by trash bags. The camera moves past a family group and other pedestrians while orange safety railings line the street edge. The urban environment continues with towering buildings and neon advertisements illuminating the night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the dim confines of an industrial interior into the overwhelming scale of a neon-lit futuristic metropolis at night. It begins in a dimly lit storage area, moving past cardboard boxes and a glowing vending machine toward a doorway where bright exterior light streams in. As the camera emerges from the building, the scene opens into a sprawling cityscape of towering skyscrapers and wet streets, eventually shifting into the concrete shadows of an elevated highway overpass lined with red construction fencing. The movement then carries the viewer out from under the overpass and into a bustling intersection, crossing the street past diverse pedestrians and beneath a massive yellow pedestrian bridge. Finally, the camera continues along the sidewalk past a green commercial kiosk and orange safety railings, surrounded by the towering urban canyon and the glow of holographic advertisements.
